name: Weak Profit Quality: Other Income Dependency
description: Other income forms a large percentage of PBT.

name: Elevated Other Income Share
description: Other income is a meaningful but not dominant share of PBT.

name: Modest Revenue Growth
description: Revenue growing YoY but below acceleration tier.

name: Revenue Growth Deceleration
description: Revenue YoY growth positive but slowing materially.

name: Finance Cost Pressure
description: Finance costs absorb a heavy share of EBITDA.

name: PAT Down Despite Revenue Growth
description: PAT contracted YoY while revenue grew.

name: Dirty Beat
description: PAT growth flattered by other income or exceptional items.

name: Clean Beat
description: Revenue, EBITDA, and PAT all up YoY with healthy other-income share.

name: Strong Cash Conversion
description: CFO materially exceeds PAT — earnings backed by cash.

name: Weak Cash Conversion
description: CFO fails to cover PAT — earnings quality concern.

name: Healthy PAT Margin
description: PAT margin above 12% for the quarter.

name: Thin PAT Margin
description: PAT margin below 8% for the quarter.

name: High Effective Tax Rate
description: Effective tax rate above 28% of PBT.

name: Revenue Growth (QoQ)
description: Revenue grew more than 5% versus the prior quarter.

name: Revenue Decline (QoQ)
description: Revenue contracted versus the prior quarter.

name: Low-Quality Growth
description: Revenue growing but cash conversion weak or receivables growing far faster than revenue.

name: High-Quality Growth
description: Revenue + margin up, cash conversion strong, receivables tame.

name: Channel-Stuffing Risk
description: Receivables growing materially faster than revenue.

name: FCF Negative
description: Free cash flow turned negative this period.

name: Deleveraging
description: Net debt to EBITDA below 1x — comfortable solvency.

name: Debt-Funded Growth
description: Revenue growth + leverage up + interest coverage low.

name: Volume Confirmation
description: Volume spike + positive reaction confirms move.

name: Speculative Spike
description: Volume spike but small price move — likely positioning, not conviction.

name: Governance Red Flag
description: Pledge high and rising or promoter selling materially.

name: Demand Tone Positive
description: Concall language references strong demand visibility.

name: Demand Tone Negative
description: Weak demand language on the concall.

name: Capex Caution
description: Limited capex / expansion language on concall.

name: Utilization Improving
description: Capacity utilization rose versus prior year.

name: Material Order Win
description: New order value exceeds 5% of TTM revenue.

name: Strategic Acquisition
description: Acquisition value exceeds 5% of market cap.

name: Capacity Expansion
description: New capacity addition above 10% of existing base.

name: TAM Tailwind
description: Addressable market grew >10% versus prior estimate.

name: Mix Shift Positive
description: High-margin revenue mix expanded >100 bps YoY.

name: Target Execution Upside
description: Management target >5% above current revenue run-rate.

name: Target Credibility Risk
description: Management target more than 10% below current revenue.

name: Cautious Management Tone
description: Management commentary cautious on near-term outlook.

name: Auditor / Notes Red Flag
description: Material item flagged in auditor's report or notes.

name: Value Trap
description: Cheap on P/E but earnings quality weak.

name: Turnaround
description: Margin expansion + PAT growth + improving management tone.

name: Narrative Mismatch
description: Confident commentary paired with weak metrics.
